calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-10-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Jul-31-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: F. Butler.
Robert Resner, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Creditors Trade Association, Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau.
Plaintiff's Witness: Sandra Hidalgo, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: La Salle Properties Inc., a California Corp., dba Century 21 Heritage as follows:
Damages $27,476.46
Prejudgment Interest $2,289.12
Costs $380.00, for a total of $30,145.58
Attorney Fees waived by the Plaintiff in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-29-2007 Continued To Sep-21-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
